title: Agent enrollment management
description: Add persistent rejected enrollment state, server API actions, and a dashboard agent management view for approving, rejecting, configuring, and deleting agents.
acceptance_criteria: Pending agents can be approved from the dashboard and the existing approval path sends enrollment acceptance on the next agent enrollment attempt.
Pending agents can be rejected from the dashboard and later enrollment attempts receive a rejected enrollment response.
Approved agents can be configured through existing command endpoints from an agent management page.
Agents can be deleted from the management page.
Bazel binary targets are named TheWatcherServer and TheWatcherAgent.
BDD-style tests cover the rejected enrollment persistence and dashboard API calls.

tasks.title: Persist rejected enrollment state
tasks.description: Extend AgentRecord and SqliteStore in server/store.hpp, server/store_sqlite.hpp, and server/store_sqlite.cpp with a rejected flag and reject_agent operation.
acceptance_criteria: Rejected agents are persisted separately from approved agents.
Approving an agent clears rejected state.

unit: GIVEN a stored pending agent WHEN reject_agent is called THEN the agent remains unapproved and is marked rejected.

tasks.implementation_notes: server_tests/store_test.cpp exercises SqliteStore with a temporary database.

tasks.title: Expose reject action and enrollment response
tasks.description: Add POST /api/agents/:id/reject in server/api.cpp and have server/server.cpp return a rejected enrollment response for rejected agents.
acceptance_criteria: Rejecting an agent clears any ZAP approval key and marks the record rejected.
Rejected agents do not remain permanently pending on later enrollment attempts.

integration: SqliteStore rejection state is covered; enrollment path is verified by targeted build and runtime behavior.

tasks.implementation_notes: Existing enrollment handling in Server::enrollment_loop sends EnrollResponse errors through send_error.

tasks.title: Build dashboard agent management view
tasks.description: Add API helpers in dashboard/src/api.ts and a management view in dashboard/src/main.tsx for enrollment actions, settings commands, operational commands, and deletion.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard has an Agents view reachable from top navigation.
Each row exposes approve, reject, poll interval, process limit, pause, resume, restart, status, and delete actions.

unit: GIVEN an API helper WHEN called THEN it sends the expected HTTP method, path, and body.

tasks.implementation_notes: dashboard/src/api.test.ts covers fetch calls; dashboard/src/status.test.ts covers rejected grouping.

tasks.title: Rename executable targets and update docs
tasks.description: Rename Bazel cc_binary targets in server/BUILD.bazel and agent/BUILD.bazel, update service/dashboard docs, bump MODULE.bazel version, and add CHANGELOG.md notes.
acceptance_criteria: Docs describe the new agent management view and API actions.
Version and changelog record the change.

integration: Build renamed server and agent targets.

tasks.implementation_notes: docs/service-installation.md contains executable paths used by operators.

nodes.label: Expose reject action and enrollment response
Rename executable targets and update docs

edges.label: API and enrollment behavior depend on stored rejection state.
Dashboard actions call server API endpoints.
